title: Maziv's Light Blue Gui
description: This texture pack features Blue Gui's into your Minecraft world
body: This Light Blue GUI brings a calm and refreshing look to your Minecraft interface. The soft blue tones create a smooth and relaxing visual experience. Every menu and button is designed to feel cleaner and more modern. It enhances clarity without changing the core Minecraft style. Perfect for players who want a peaceful and polished aesthetic.
